docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORELIK, MIKHIAL AS TO DEFENDANT LESCHINGER, CHRIS
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-11-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-04-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2020 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-03-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MIKHIAL GORELIK IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER DEMITRY ERENKOV. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE UNTIMELY. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GORELIK, MIKHIAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $105.00) SERVED JAN-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LESCHINGER, CHRIS
DECLARATION OF MIKHAIL GORELIK RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORELIK, MIKHIAL
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF MIKHAIL GORELIK, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIONA INTERPERTER TATIANA IACONA IS PRESENT. DEMITRY ERENKOV TESTIFIES ON BAHALF OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CHRIS LESCHINGER IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVEIWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GORELIK, MIKHIAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LESCHINGER, CHRIS $2,024.65 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,219.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,024.65 FILED BY GORELIK, MIKHIAL AS TO DEFENDANT LESCHINGER, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
